prestazioni: Engine: 1.75L TBi (I4, engine code: 940 A5.000) – Full forged internals upgrade with JE Pistons 2618 alloy forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 30+ psi boost capability. Pair with a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping with a PWR 450mm x 200mm x 76mm bar-and-plate intercooler for sustained 400+ hp on E85.

Drivetrain: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a PPG Gearset (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.08, 3rd: 1.57, 4th: 1.22, 5th: 1.00, 6th: 0.80) and a Fidanza 15.5lb aluminum flywheel with ARP 625+ bolts. Upgrade to a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock) and custom 300M axles with CV joints from a GTA-R spec build for 500+ lb-ft torque handling.

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX40 2-way adjustable coilovers with 400lb/in front and 350lb/in rear springs, custom valving for the 4C’s carbon tub, and spherical bearing top mounts. Reinforce the rear subframe with a 4C-specific Cusco 3-point strut brace and install a full set of SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF0116K) for subframe, control arms, and anti-roll bars. Add a custom 25mm rear sway bar from H&R for reduced body roll.
estetica: Aero: Full Novitec Torado 4C Spider widebody kit with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser (CFRP pre-preg autoclave construction). Pair with a custom 1,200mm x 350mm carbon fiber rear wing (3D-molded from a 4C GT race car) mounted on aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees). Add a custom front canard set from APR Performance (GT-250 model) for 150+ lbs of downforce at 120 mph.

Exterior: Full respray in Alfa Rosso Competizione with a 3-stage PPG paint system (primer, base, and clearcoat with ceramic coating). Replace all exterior trim with carbon fiber alternatives: Seibon carbon fiber hood (heat-extracting vents), carbon fiber side mirrors (Rieger Tuning), and a carbon fiber hardtop (Novitec) with a custom Alcantara headliner. Add OEM+ touches like a carbon fiber fuel cap (Alfa Original Accessories) and titanium exhaust tips (Akrapović).

Wheels & Stance: Custom 3-piece forged wheels from BBS (FI-R model) in 18x9 +35 front and 19x11 +40 rear with titanium hardware. Tire setup: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (235/35 R18 front, 305/30 R19 rear) with a 5mm front spacer and 10mm rear spacer for aggressive flush fitment. Add custom center-lock adapters (D9 Racing) and titanium valve stems (TiAL). Lower the ride height 30mm from stock with Öhlins coilovers and add a custom air suspension delete kit (Air Lift Performance) for track use.
